arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag could spoil Manchester United transfer plan with Jurgen Klopp link-up
arts.sum: The former Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has been linked with a move to RB Leipzig following Marco Rose's struggles

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim slammed for tactical error which cost Man Utd in Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United fans were left baffled when Ruben Amorim withdrew Bruno Fernandes for Mason Mount in the 76th minute despite the team seeking an equaliser at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Forest loss makes scale of Manchester United rebuild clear to Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Following back-to-back defeats, it shows that the task at hand for Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim will continue to be a hard one.

arts.ttl: Amorim's task to improve 'mediocre Man Utd'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's task of improving Manchester United's fortunes is becoming clear to him after a defeat by Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's immediate one-word reaction as Nottingham Forest beat Manchester United
Gary Neville slams Man United for 'being outrun every single week' and reveals the lesson they could learn from Chelsea as Rio Ferdinand brands defeat to Nottingham Forest a 'shambles'
arts.sum: Gary Neville has criticised Manchester United for 'being outrun every single week'. Ruben Amorim's side suffered a second successive defeat as they were beaten 3-2 at home to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Amorim: It is a long journey at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim acknowledged the "long journey" that will be required to return success to Manchester United as Nottingham Forest handed his team a 3-2 defeat at Old Trafford. A late goal from Bruno Fernandes was not enough to stop Amorim suffering back-to-back top-flight defeats for just the second time in his managerial career following on from Wednesday’s loss at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson and Chris Wood wowed by one Nottingham Forest player vs Man United
arts.sum: Nice to see Cafu pop up...

arts.ttl: 'Not many things to be upset about' - Nuno on defeating Man Utd
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest manager Nuno Espírito Santo praises his sides performance after they beat Manchester United 3-2 at Old Trafford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'started really bad' - Amorin reacts to defeat by Forest
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorin says his side "started really bad" against Nottingham Forest after their 3-2 defeat at home in the Premier League.
